title.en: General requirements of tissue-engineered medical products
title.zh: 组织工程医疗产品的通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for tissue-engineered medical products (TEMPs) covering cells, scaffolds and combined products for regenerative medicine. Confirmed 2024.
standards.scope: General requirements for tissue-engineered medical products.

title.en: Medical products containing viable human cells - Application of risk management and requirements for processing practices
title.zh: 含有活人体细胞的医疗产品 - 风险管理应用及加工操作要求

standards.abstract: Specifies application of risk management and processing requirements for medical products containing viable human cells. Confirmed 2018.
standards.scope: Risk management and processing for medical products containing viable human cells.

title.en: Standard Guide for Characterization and Testing of Biomaterial Scaffolds Used in Tissue-Engineered Medical Products
title.zh: 组织工程医疗产品中使用的生物材料支架的表征和测试标准指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on characterization and testing of biomaterial scaffolds used in tissue-engineered medical products, including mechanical, degradation, and biological properties.
standards.scope: Characterization of biomaterial scaffolds for tissue engineering applications.

title.en: Standard Terminology Relating to Tissue Engineered Medical Products
title.zh: 与组织工程医疗产品相关的标准术语

standards.abstract: Defines and describes terminology relating to tissue-engineered medical products (TEMPs). Reapproved 2020.
